title: tephrosia leveillei
intro: Tephrosia leveillei is a medicinal plant species within the Fabaceae family, also known as the pea or bean family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia leveillei include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as acting as a natural remedy for wound healing and digestive issues. In traditional medicine, Tephrosia leveillei is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for various herbal preparations, including teas and creams.
